task: Improve ResearchOps mobile account UI against GOV.UK mobile reference quality.
changes: Added account-page scoped mobile refinement stylesheet.
Added account page class hooks without changing account semantics.
Made mobile header, navigation and footer edge-to-edge for the account page.
Improved mobile content rhythm and summary-list alignment.
Made account action buttons full-width on mobile.
Extended account route-state tests to assert the premium mobile assets.
